title: MediaSessionService dispatchMediaKeyEventToSessionAsSystemService missing permission check
notes: dispatchMediaKeyEventToSessionAsSystemService() dispatches media key events as system service (asSystemService=true) but has no permission check verifying caller is system. Any app with a valid MediaSession.Token (obtainable by notification listeners or via getSessions()) can inject system-level key events into any session. Also: dispatchMediaKeyEvent() doesn't validate packageName — caller impersonation possible. addSession2TokensListener() skips enforceMediaPermissions() unlike addSessionsListener().
